description: Master ON/OFF switches for Finwiz Screener growth + capitulation modes

sma_filter.notes: When enabled, BUY requires price above selected SMA (pct > 0). Periods 9/100 use proxies if raw fields missing.

tight_buy.notes: Stricter BUY band so fewer names qualify

capitulation_mode.label: Mean Reversion / Capitulation (second screener)
capitulation_mode.notes: Oversold names with 5–50% drawdown over ~30–90 days (Perf Month / Perf Quarter)
